message:
feat(beads): Add comprehensive beads for alien technology artifact transformation

Created 50+ new beads covering:
- Phase 7: UX Refinement and Premium TUI (5 tasks)
- Phase 9: Shadow Mode and Calibration (3 tasks)
- Phase 11: Pattern/Signature Library (3 tasks)
- Phase 12: Trajectory Prediction and Baselines (3 tasks)
- Phase 13: Goal-Oriented Optimization (3 tasks)
- Phase 14: Fleet Mode (3 tasks)
- Phase 15: Enhanced UX for Agents (3 tasks)
- Dormant Mode Daemon (3 tasks)
- Session Bundles and HTML Reports (3 tasks)
- Comprehensive test beads (12 tasks)
- Advanced inference features (8 tasks)
- Agent CLI commands (8 tasks)
- Dependencies between all new beads

Total: 273 open beads with proper dependency chains.
